title: Salty Syrian Cheese Quesadilla
description: A comforting, velvety Syrian dish featuring shredded Mexican cheese, caramelized flavors, and no eggs for a rich, savory experience.

ingredients.name: syrian cheese (shredded)
ingredients.notes: finely shredded, use low-moisture cheese for best results

ingredients.name: caramelized onions
ingredients.notes: finely chopped, sautéed in 1 tsp oil until golden

ingredients.name: salty seasoning blend
ingredients.notes: mix of black pepper, cumin, and sumac for flavor

instructions: Heat 1 tbsp olive oil in a medium skillet over medium heat.
Add 1 small chopped onion and sauté until golden brown (3-4 minutes).
Stir in 1/2 tsp salty seasoning blend and cook for 1 minute.
Layer 30g shredded syrian cheese over the onions in the skillet.
Cook for 1-2 minutes until cheese melts and edges are golden.
Serve warm with a side of fresh parsley for garnish.
